text: The surgeon uses a stapler device with robotic instruments, demonstrating their range of movement and dexterity to perform precise surgical maneuvers. The heart is visible inside the pericardium on the left side of the surgical field.

The surgeon uses a robotic stapler to divide the pulmonary vein to the upper lobe, sealing the vessel. The stapler is then used to seal and divide the bronchus, completing the division of the airway to the upper lobe.
The surgeon places the excised specimen into a retrieval bag for removal, marking the completion of the thymectomy procedure.
